{{Infobox character
| name = Vall
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] is a three-star [[Titan]], a [[Spider]], and a [[Ghost]] in [[Cirian]]'s squad.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] scans for traces of her prey.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] uses shields of blue light for close combat.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] is a member of the [[Second Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
